title: pseudolysimachion × neglectum
intro: Pseudolysimachion × neglectum, also known as Alpine Whortleberry or Alpine Wintergreen, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the family Primulaceae. This perennial plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, which has anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. Pseudolysimachion × neglectum has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, making it a popular natural remedy in folk medicine.
